prompt: Do you provide a certificate of completion after finishing the course?
response: Yes! Once you complete all modules and submit the final project, Nullclass issues a verifiable certificate of completion that you can add to your LinkedIn profile and resume.

prompt: Is there a mobile app to access the course content?
response: Right now Nullclass course content is accessed through our web platform and Discord community. We do not have a dedicated mobile app yet, but the website is fully mobile-responsive.

prompt: Can I pay the course fee using UPI?
response: Yes, UPI is supported as a payment method for learners in India, in addition to debit/credit cards and our EMI option.
